title: Auto Replant Crops
description: Automatically replants fully grown crops after harvesting in Minecraft. A lightweight vanilla farming QoL mod for survival and SMP (1.16+).
body:
Auto-Replant Crops – Automatic Farming Datapack (1.16+)

Automatically replant crops after harvesting in Minecraft – simple, lightweight, and survival-friendly.

This vanilla Minecraft datapack improves farming quality-of-life by automatically replanting crops when you harvest them. No more manual replanting after every farm cycle!

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dlyg3FUx/images/fb71fd4981fa9bdb797407a93b664e91829a2c31.gif)

Only fully grown crops are replanted (must drop 2+ items).

Supported Crops:

  • Wheat
  • Carrots
  • Potatoes
  • Beetroot

Toggle On/Off – Enable or disable the auto-replant system anytime using simple commands.

Informations

  • Want to disable temporarily? Sneak(1.21+) while harvesting or use the toggle command
  • /function autoreplant:enable & /function autoreplant:disable
  • Must be within 5 blocks of the crop
  • Only works on farmland blocks
  • Designed for survival and multiplayer servers
  • Vanilla datapack – No Fabric or Forge required

Perfect for: Survival worlds, SMP servers, farming builds, and players who want a smoother automatic farming experience.

Search Keywords: Minecraft auto replant datapack, automatic crop replant, farming QoL datapack, Minecraft farming mod vanilla, auto farming 1.21, SMP farming improvement.
